_comment: Coverage map for caption-parity-eval. Script-kind verifiers reference scripts/eval/eval-caption-parity.ps1 (stub committed alongside this bundle; exits 2 until implemented). AC-002-a targets the eval-harness-runner agent. AC-003-a is doc-section-verified against BLUEPRINT.md.

steps: Confirm exactly three directories: single_line_01, multi_line_wrap_01, rapid_fire_01.
For each fixture, confirm both input.json and expected.json exist and are valid JSON (Get-Content <path> | ConvertFrom-Json).
Confirm input.json declares Word[], keep_segments, video_dims, caption_profile, and timeline_domain fields.
Confirm expected.json contains a CaptionBlock[] snapshot with pixel-space geometry and timeline-domain timestamps.

AC-002-a.command: Invoke the eval-harness-runner agent (see .github/agents/eval-harness-runner.agent.md) and confirm it wraps eval-caption-parity.ps1.
steps: Open .github/agents/eval-harness-runner.agent.md and confirm scripts/eval/eval-caption-parity.ps1 is listed alongside the other wrapped evals.
Invoke the eval-harness-runner agent in a new conversation: 'Run every eval'.
Confirm the agent runs pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/eval/eval-caption-parity.ps1 without per-script special casing.
Confirm the agent's aggregated JSON includes a caption-parity block with the standard { pass, fixtures[], summary } shape.
